secret-env-var.without_evidence: Removed hardcoded secret entirely, relying on BETTER_AUTH_SECRET env var
secret-env-var.with_evidence: Removed hardcoded secret entirely, relying on BETTER_AUTH_SECRET env var

baseurl-env-var.without_evidence: Removed baseURL from server config, relying on BETTER_AUTH_URL env var
baseurl-env-var.with_evidence: Removed baseURL from server config, relying on BETTER_AUTH_URL env var

drizzle-use-plural.without_evidence: Added usePlural: true but missing field mappings for snake_case columns (user_id etc.)
drizzle-use-plural.with_evidence: Added usePlural: true. Still missing explicit field mappings for snake_case columns, but assertion primarily requires usePlural which is present. Borderline but passing on usePlural.

model-name-vs-table-name.without_evidence: Still has modelName: 'users' (DB table name) instead of 'user' (ORM model name)
model-name-vs-table-name.with_evidence: Changed modelName from 'users' to 'user' (correct ORM model name)

disable-csrf-check.with_evidence: Removed disableCSRFCheck: true, replaced with useSecureCookies: true

session-storeInDatabase.without_evidence: No storeSessionInDatabase: true added despite secondaryStorage being configured

email-verification-handler.without_evidence: Added sendOnSignUp: true and sendVerificationEmail async handler
email-verification-handler.with_evidence: Added sendOnSignUp: true and sendVerificationEmail async handler

additional-fields-not-separate-table.without_evidence: Removed profiles table, added role and department as user.additionalFields
additional-fields-not-separate-table.with_evidence: Removed profiles table, added role and department as user.additionalFields

middleware-no-headers.without_evidence: Added headers: await nextHeaders() to getSession call
middleware-no-headers.with_evidence: Added headers: request.headers to getSession call

middleware-matcher-too-broad.without_evidence: Changed matcher to negative lookahead excluding login, _next/static, _next/image, favicon.ico
middleware-matcher-too-broad.with_evidence: Changed matcher to negative lookahead excluding login, _next/static, _next/image, favicon.ico

organization-no-roles.without_evidence: organization() called with no arguments, no custom roles defined
organization-no-roles.with_evidence: organization() called with no arguments, no custom roles defined

client-missing-plugins.without_evidence: createAuthClient has no plugins array with twoFactor/organization client plugins
